name: python3-service-identity
title: python3-service-identity
summary: Service identity verification for pyOpenSSL (Python 3 module)
description:
Service identity verification for pyOpenSSL (Python 3 module)
Service_identity aspires to give you all the tools you need for verifying
whether a certificate is valid for the intended purposes.
.
In the simplest case, this means host name verification.  However,
service_identity implements RFC 6125 fully and plans to add other
relevant RFCs too.
.
This package contains service_identity for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-service-identity because Service identity verification for pyOpenSSL (Python 3 module).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-service-identity as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-service-identity with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-service-identity --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
